name: William D. Phillips
title: Physicist & Nobel Laureate
bio: American physicist who was awarded the Nobel Prize in Physics in 1997 for development of methods to cool and trap atoms with laser light.
faith: A practicing Methodist who has spoken about the compatibility of science and faith. He has said, 'I believe in God. In fact, I believe in a personal God who acts in and interacts with the creation.'
